steps.assistant_text: 58-insn sub-object register sequence with 8 gl_func_00000000 calls + conditional branch on a0[0x6A8] state field. Sibling of 0x880 family. D-table reads at offsets 0x4C, 0x54, 0x64.

metadata.verification: Byte-correct ROM build via INCLUDE_ASM (default build path takes #else branch, INCLUDE_ASM resolves to .s file = expected). 232 bytes / 58 insns. C body 99.83% on its own with 1-insn IDO-CSE residual on the 5 D-extern accesses (per feedback_unique_extern_with_offset_cast_breaks_cse.md path).
